name: LeadSphere
features: contact and company management with activity timeline
deal pipeline with unlimited custom stages
email integration: Gmail and Outlook bidirectional sync
reporting: deal velocity, pipeline value, win/loss by rep
mobile app: iOS and Android, stable
API with high rate limits (20k req/hr)
known_limitations: LinkedIn enrichment module in beta — GA targeted Q3 2025
Conversation intelligence (call recording) on roadmap only
Custom object support limited on Core tier
